subject: ACOE
body:
I am pleased to tell you that I have been given formal notification by ACOE
that they have discontinued their enforcement proceedings and are prepared
to accept a properly documented after the fact application for the items
which we wish to have approved. Our meeting has been moved to Thursday at 10
where I am to present the details formally  arrive at a plan to move the
application ahead as fast as possible to approval. 

 

Lafayette Contractors, LLC

6100 Red Hook Quarters, Suite A2-7

St. Thomas, VI 00802

340 779-8054 (O)

340 779-8055 (FAX)

340 690-7194 (Cell)

I am pleased to tell you that I have been given formal notification by ACOE that they have discontinued their enforcement proceedings and are prepared to accept a properly documented after the fact application for the items which we wish to have approved. Our meeting has been moved to Thursday at 10 where I am to present the details formally  arrive at a plan to move the application ahead as fast as possible to approval.
